title: Mastering your attention over distraction — The Game of mind
stanceSummary: Attention is devotion: what occupies your mind defines you. Classical texts describe distraction as pulling the heart toward empty entertainment; turning attention toward Allah gathers the scattered self. Auto-captions below are lightly cleaned; listen to the lecture to confirm wording and context.
alternateQuestions: How can I focus on Allah with so many distractions?
What does Islam say about mindfulness and attention?
How do I stop my mind from being scattered?
